texto: Have you ever been so blindsided by a kiss you had to hold on for dear life to avoid toppling over like a sapling in a fierce storm? Yeah, me either. This was a first. It was no ordinary kiss. This felt like a revelation. Like a thunderclap accompanied by the soulful voices of a Greek chorus.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lane Hayes: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Have you ever been so blindsided by a kiss you had to hold on for dear life to avoid toppling ove…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, contemporary, mm-romance pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e mm-romance.
